This includes help with checking and understanding privacy and safety settings. They also told us parents shouldn’t be afraid to set boundaries; teens expect and even welcome them. Safety features like Family Pairing are tools to allow families to set parameters, which are especially important while teens are starting out online.","phototextApp_digitalParentingTips_safetyTips1_title":"“Help me understand the rules”","phototextApp_digitalParentingTips_safetyTips2_body":"Teens want trusted adults to be interested in their digital lives and to recognize how important they are to them. Teens feel supported when they know they have an ally who is available to talk to them. Don’t be afraid to start a conversation. They appreciate hearing you understand things can go wrong online, and you’ll be there to help if they do, no matter the scale of the problem.","phototextApp_digitalParentingTips_safetyTips2_title":"“Be available to chat”","phototextApp_digitalParentingTips_safetyTips3_body":"When your teen seeks your help, it’s a positive step. They may be feeling vulnerable, scared, embarrassed, or upset, so let them know how happy you are that they’ve reached out. When they share their problem, be mindful of your reaction; teens told us that responding with anger discourages them from seeking help again. Also, avoid downplaying their concerns, even if you don’t fully understand why they’re upset. Listen without blame, ask questions, and focus on finding solutions together. If they’ve broken rules, teens expect consequences, but they also desire guidance on how to avoid similar mistakes in the future.","phototextApp_digitalParentingTips_safetyTips3_title":"“Don't panic when things go wrong”","phototextApp_digitalParentingTips_safetyTips4_body":"Teens understand that trust is earned, and expect adult supervision, especially younger teens. Like in the physical world, teens feel they should gain more autonomy as they mature. Every family is different and the pace at which a teen moves toward independent use of technology will vary, but if your teen knows how to use platforms safely and turns to you for help when needed, it builds a strong foundation for trust.","phototextApp_digitalParentingTips_safetyTips4_title":"“Trust me”","phototextApp_digitalParentingTips_safetyTips5_body":"Striking a balance between a teenager’s expectation of privacy and ensuring their safety, both online and offline, is a challenging aspect of parenting. When your teen asks you not to follow them on a platform, it’s natural to worry, but they might just want space to connect with friends privately. There may be good reasons why you feel following your teen’s account is necessary. If so, teens say they want to understand your reasons and to explore ways to build trust. Older teens told us they feel protective of younger relatives and naturally look out for them online, so consider if someone else could monitor their activity in your place.","phototextApp_digitalParentingTips_safetyTips5_title":"“Respect my privacy”","phototextApp_digitalParentingTips_safetyTips_body":"At TikTok Notes, we’re committed to working in partnership with parents and caregivers as you support your teen’s digital experience. We understand that staying updated of changing trends and emerging platforms can be overwhelming. We want to help simplify this by sharing insights into the kind of support teens genuinely appreciate from trusted adults. And who better to provide guidance on their needs than teens themselves? Here’s what they shared with us:","phototextApp_digitalParentingTips_safetyTips_title":"Online safety: 5 tips from teens","phototextApp_digitalParentingTips_sheetHeader_title":"Digital parenting tips","phototextApp_duplicateKey_UG_feed_bottomSheetOver18_desc":"TikTok Notes, our new app dedicated to your photo posts, is on its way, and we’re preparing your account for you!

We do not allow showing or promoting dangerous activities and challenges. This includes dares, games, tricks, inappropriate use of dangerous tools, eating substances that are harmful to one’s health, or similar activities that may lead to significant physical harm.","CG2023_violateNotif_sectionDesc_dangerActNFF":"Most activities or challenges are appropriate for everyone, but some may carry a risk of significant injury. Content is ineligible for the For You feed if it involves activities likely to lead to moderate physical harm or includes professionals performing extreme sports and stunts that may endanger others.","CG2023_violateNotif_sectionDesc_dangerActNR":"Most activities or challenges are appropriate for everyone, but some carry a risk of significant injury. Content is ineligible for the For You feed if it involves activities that are likely to lead to moderate physical harm, or includes professionals who are performing extreme sports and stunts that may endanger others.","CG2023_violateNotif_sectionDesc_dangerWeapons":"TikTok can be a place that educates people on the responsible use and ownership of weapons, as well as the associated potential for serious harm. Firearms and explosive weapons can cause severe injury or death, especially when used in an unsafe manner. We do not allow the trade of firearms or explosive weapons, or content showing or promoting them if they are not used in a safe or appropriate setting.","CG2023_violateNotif_sectionDesc_dangerWeaponsNFF":"TikTok can be a place that educates people on the responsible use and ownership of weapons, as well as the associated potential for serious harm. Firearms and explosive weapons can cause severe injury or death, especially when used in an unsafe manner. Content showing firearms and explosive weapons in an unsafe or inappropriate setting is ineligible for the For You Feed as it may put younger people at risk of harm.","CG2023_violateNotif_sectionDesc_electIntegrity":"Elections are important moments of community conversation and promote the values of an open society. This includes misinformation about how to vote, registering to vote, eligibility requirements of candidates, the processes to count ballots and certify elections, and the final outcome of an election.","CG2023_violateNotif_sectionDesc_electIntegrityNFF":"We want to enable the informed exchange of civic ideas in a way that fosters productive dialogue. Content is ineligible for the For You feed if it seeks to trick or manipulate others to increase followers, likes, or views.","CG2023_violateNotif_sectionDesc_fraudScam":"We want people to be able to use our platform to learn about ways to be financially responsible and consider economic transactions or investment opportunities, without worrying about scams or financial exploitation. We do not allow attempts to defraud or scam members of our community.","CG2023_violateNotif_sectionDesc_gambling":"Many people around the world find entertainment through games of chance. We do not allow anyone to promote or materially support violent or hateful actors.","CG2023_violateNotif_sectionDesc_humanXploit":"We are committed to upholding individual human dignity and ensuring that our platform is not used to take advantage of vulnerable people. We do not allow human exploitation, including trafficking and smuggling. We provide a space for survivors of human exploitation to share their stories and for migrants and refugees to be able to document their journeys.","CG2023_violateNotif_sectionDesc_minAge":"Users must be 14 years and older to have a TikTok account. We are deeply committed to ensuring that TikTok is a safe and positive experience for people under the age of 18. This starts by being old enough to use TikTok. If we learn someone is below the minimum age on TikTok, we will ban that account. Content created by anyone under 16 is ineligible for the For You feed and harder to find in search.","CG2023_violateNotif_sectionDesc_misInfo":"In a global community, it is natural for people to have different opinions, but we seek to operate on a shared set of facts and reality. We do not allow inaccurate, misleading, or false content that may cause significant harm to individuals or society, regardless of intent. Significant harm includes physical, psychological, or societal harm, and property damage.","CG2023_violateNotif_sectionDesc_misInfoNR":"In a global community, it is natural for people to have different opinions, but we seek to operate on a shared set of facts and reality. Content is ineligible for the For You feed and harder to find in search if it contains general conspiracy theories or unverified information related to emergencies. Content sent for fact checking may also be temporarily ineligible for the For You feed while it is undergoing review.","CG2023_violateNotif_sectionDesc_nudityXposure":"We celebrate all shapes and sizes and want people to feel comfortable in how they present themselves and their bodies. We do not allow nudity, including uncovered genitals and buttocks, as well as nipples and areolas of women and girls. Sheer and partially see-through clothing is not considered covered.","CG2023_violateNotif_sectionDesc_personInfo":"We are committed to making sure that any personal information shared intentionally or accidentally on TikTok does not lead to harm. We do not allow content that includes personal information that may create a risk of stalking, violence, phishing, fraud, identity theft, or financial exploitation, including content that someone has posted themselves or that they consented to being shared by others.","CG2023_violateNotif_sectionDesc_qrCode":"The creativity on TikTok is what makes it great, so you should only post your own work. Content is ineligible for the For You feed and harder to find in search if it involves unoriginal or reproduced content that does not have any new or creative changes, or contains Quick Response (QR) codes.","CG2023_violateNotif_sectionDesc_regulateGoods":"Regulated goods and services often play an important and essential role in people’s lives. However, these items are regulated for a reason. TikTok is not a place for illegal traffic or trade, or an unofficial market. We do not allow facilitating the trade of regulated, prohibited, or high-risk goods and services, such as alcohol, tobacco products, regulated substances, firearms and other dangerous weapons, sexual services, animals, or counterfeit goods.","CG2023_violateNotif_sectionDesc_sexAct":"TikTok is a place where people can come to discuss or learn about sexuality, sex or reproductive health. We are mindful that certain content involving sexuality, sex or reproductive health may not be appropriate for young people, be considered offensive by some, or create the potential for exploitation. We do not allow sexual activity or services, including sex, sexual arousal, fetish and kink behavior, and seeking or offering sexual services.","CG2023_violateNotif_sectionDesc_sexContent":"We welcome performances and dances where people can creatively express themselves, celebrate their culture, or seek to entertain. We are mindful that certain behaviors related to sexual arousal or suggestiveness may be offensive to some people and may put young people at risk of exploitation. We do not allow seductive performances or allusions to sexual activity by young people, or the use of sexually explicit narratives by anyone.","CG2023_violateNotif_sectionDesc_sexContentNFF":"We are mindful that certain behaviors related to sexual arousal or suggestiveness may be offensive to some people and may put young people at risk of exploitation. Content is ineligible for the For You feed if it shows sex products or intends to sexually arouse (such as intimate kissing, sexualized posing, and seductive performances or allusions to sexual activity by adults).","CG2023_violateNotif_sectionDesc_sexContentNR":"We are mindful that certain behaviors related to sexual arousal or suggestiveness may be offensive to some people and may put young people at risk of exploitation. Content is ineligible for the For You feed and harder to find in search if it shows sex products or intends to sexually arouse (such as intimate kissing, sexualized posing, and seductive performances or allusions to sexual activity by adults).","CG2023_violateNotif_sectionDesc_shockContent":"Part of the joy of TikTok is coming across new and unexpected content. But the platform is not a place to intentionally shock, upset, or disgust others. We recognize this type of content may be triggering, cause psychological harm, or lead to extreme discomfort. We do not allow gory, gruesome, disturbing, or extremely violent content.","CG2023_violateNotif_sectionDesc_shockContentNFF":"Part of the joy of TikTok is coming across new and unexpected content. But the platform is not a place to intentionally shock, upset, or disgust others. Content is ineligible for the For You feed if it shows fictional violence, blood, potentially distressing or mildly graphic material, animal genitalia or sexual activity between animals, or if it contains graphic footage of events that are in the public interest to view.","CG2023_violateNotif_sectionDesc_shockContentNR":"Part of the joy of TikTok is coming across new and unexpected content. But the platform is not a space to intentionally shock, upset, or disgust others. Content is ineligible for the For You feed and harder to find in search if it shows fictional violence, blood, potentially distressing or mildly graphic material, animal genitalia or sexual activity between animals, or if it contains graphic footage of events that are in the public interest to view.","CG2023_violateNotif_sectionDesc_suicideHarm":"We want TikTok to be a place where people can discuss emotionally complex topics in a supportive way without increasing the risk of harm. We do not allow showing, promoting, or sharing plans for suicide or self-harm. If you or someone you know has had thoughts of suicide or self-harm, support is available.","CG2023_violateNotif_sectionDesc_synMedia":"We welcome the creativity that new artificial intelligence (AI) and other digital technologies may unlock. However, AI can make it more difficult to distinguish between fact and fiction. Synthetic or manipulated media that shows realistic scenes must be clearly disclosed. We do not allow synthetic media that contains the likeness of any real private figure, in addition to synthetic media of public figures if the content is used for endorsements or violates any other policy.","CG2023_violateNotif_sectionDesc_violentAct":"We recognize that online content related to violence can cause real-world harm. We do not allow any violent threats, incitement to violence, or promotion of criminal activities that may harm people, animals, or property. If there is a specific, credible, and imminent threat to human life or serious physical injury, we will report it to relevant law enforcement authorities.","CG2023_violateNotif_sectionDesc_youthAbuse":"Allowing young people to explore and learn safely during their unique phase of development is our priority. We do not allow youth exploitation and abuse, including child sexual abuse material (CSAM), nudity, grooming, sextortion, solicitation, pedophilia, and physical or psychological abuse of young people. You can turn off Restricted Mode in “Settings and privacy” on the TikTok app.","cc_webapp_rm_self_video_details_title":"Video unavailable in Restricted Mode","cc_webapp_rm_video_preview":"Video unavailable in Restricted Mode.","cell_sent_groupinvite1":"shared a group invite","cell_sent_photo":"shared photos","cgViolationReasons_detailPg_sectionCivility_body":"Physical and psychological safety form the foundation of individual well-being, and civility is the key to a thriving community. Being civil does not mean people must always agree, but rather it is about recognizing everyone’s inherent dignity and being respectful in action, words, and tone when engaging others. We do not allow content related to hate, harassment, bullying, violence, exploitation, or abuse.","cgViolationReasons_detailPg_sectionCivility_label":"Safety and Civility","cgViolationReasons_detailPg_sectionGoodsNRNFF_body":"To ensure we provide a space for people to learn without undue risk of physical or financial harm, we moderate content that may be risky, addictive, dangerous, fraudulent, or otherwise require a higher degree of care. We restrict content related to adults using tobacco products or consuming excessive amounts of alcohol.","cgViolationReasons_detailPg_sectionGoodsViolation_body":"To ensure we provide a space for people to learn without undue risk of physical or financial harm, we moderate content that may be risky, addictive, dangerous, fraudulent, or otherwise require a higher degree of care. We do not allow attempts to defraud or scam our community, recreational drug use, young people using alcohol, tobacco products or drugs, or some content with firearms and explosive weapons. We also do not allow the promotion of gambling services, paid political promotion, or the trade of regulated, prohibited, or high-risk goods and services.","cgViolationReasons_detailPg_sectionGoods_label":"Regulated Goods and Commercial Activities","cgViolationReasons_detailPg_sectionIntegrityNRNFF_body":"We want everyone to feel confident that they can access information that is reliable, discover content that is original, and engage with people who are authentic. This is foundational to building a community of trust and accountability both on TikTok and off-platform. We restrict general conspiracy theories that are unfounded and claim that certain events or situations are carried out by covert or powerful groups, unverified information related to an emergency or unfolding event where the details are still emerging, or potential high-harm misinformation while it is undergoing a fact-checking review, or unverified claims about the outcome of an election that is still unfolding and may be false or misleading. We also restrict content that tricks or manipulates others as a way to increase engagement metrics, some reproduced or unoriginal content, low quality content, and QR codes.","cgViolationReasons_detailPg_sectionIntegrityViolation_body":"We want everyone to feel confident that they can access information that is reliable, discover content that is original, and engage with people who are authentic. This is foundational to building a community of trust and accountability both on TikTok and off-platform. We do not allow inaccurate, misleading, or false content that may cause significant harm to individuals or society; paid political promotion, political advertising, or fundraising by politicians and political parties; misinformation about civic and electoral processes; synthetic media that contains the likeness of any real private figure; or some synthetic media of public figures. We also do not allow attempts to artificially increase engagement or deceive TikTok’s recommendation system; violations of intellectual property rights; spam or misleading account behaviors; or the use of multiple accounts to intentionally bypass our rules or their enforcement.","cgViolationReasons_detailPg_sectionIntegrity_label":"Integrity and Authenticity","cgViolationReasons_detailPg_sectionMatureNRNFF_body":"TikTok provides content that ranges from very family-friendly to more mature. Given the diversity of our global community, developmental and cultural considerations inform our approach to potentially sensitive and more mature content that may be considered offensive by some. We restrict content that shows sex products, intimate kissing, sexualized posing, moderate body exposure of young people, or significant body exposure, seductive performances, and allusions to sexual activity by adults. We also restrict graphic or potentially distressing footage of events in the public interest to view, fictional graphic violence and extreme physical fighting, blood of humans and animals, potentially distressing material that may cause anxiety or fear, mildly graphic material that may cause disgust, and genitalia and sexual activity of animals.","cgViolationReasons_detailPg_sectionMatureViolation_body":"TikTok provides content that ranges from very family-friendly to more mature. Given the diversity of our global community, developmental and cultural considerations inform our approach to potentially sensitive and more mature content that may be considered offensive by some. We do not allow nudity, sexual activity or services, seductive performances by young people, or sexually explicit narratives. We also do not allow gory, gruesome, disturbing, or extremely violent content, or animal abuse, trade, or exploitation.","cgViolationReasons_detailPg_sectionMature_label":"Sensitive and Mature Themes","cgViolationReasons_detailPg_sectionMentalNRNFF_body":"We care deeply about the well-being of our community members and want to be a source of happiness, enrichment, and belonging. We work to make sure this occurs in a supportive space that does not negatively impact people’s physical or psychological health. We restrict content showing activities that involve visible or imminent moderate physical harm, promoting activities that are likely to lead to moderate physical harm, or showing extreme sports or stunts performed by professionals in public spaces.","cgViolationReasons_detailPg_sectionMentalViolation_body":"We care deeply about the well-being of our community members and want to be a source of happiness, enrichment, and belonging. We work to make sure this occurs in a supportive space that does not negatively impact people’s physical or psychological health. We do not allow content showing or promoting suicide, self-harm, disordered eating, dangerous weight loss behaviors, or dangerous activities and challenges.","cgViolationReasons_detailPg_sectionMental_label":"Mental and Behavioral Health","cgViolationReasons_detailPg_sectionPrivacyViolation_body":"We are committed to making sure that any personal information shared intentionally or accidentally on TikTok does not lead to harm. We do not allow content that includes personal information that may create a risk of stalking, violence, phishing, fraud, identity theft, or financial exploitation, including content that someone has posted themselves or that they consented to being shared by others.","cgViolationReasons_detailPg_sectionPrivacy_label":"Privacy and Security","cgViolationReasons_detailPg_sectionYouth_body":"Users must be 13 years and older to have a TikTok account. We are deeply committed to ensuring that TikTok is a safe and positive experience for people under the age of 18. This starts by being old enough to use TikTok. If we learn someone is below the minimum age on TikTok, we will ban that account. Content created by anyone under 16 is ineligible for the For You feed and harder to find in search.","cgViolationReasons_detailPg_sectionYouth_label":"Youth Safety and We will send you a notification when your new settings are ready to use.","dm_permissionFAQ_q2_header":"What is changing?","dm_permissionFAQ_q3_body":"Your new settings will include the following permissions: - Friends: These are users who you follow and who follow you back. - Potential connections: These are users who have mutual connections with you, are a follower, or someone you follow. - Others: These are other users who are between the ages of 16 and 17 on TikTok. If you choose to turn on Friends, then messages from your friends will always be delivered to your inbox. If you choose to turn on Potential Connections and Others, then you'll receive a message request instead. If you choose to communicate with them, you will have to accept their message request first.","dm_permissionFAQ_q3_header":"I am 16 or 17 years old, what is changing for me?","dm_permissionFAQ_q4_body":"Your new settings will include the following permissions: - Potential Connections: These are your followers. - Others: These are other users on TikTok. Messages from your friends and people you follow will always be delivered to your inbox. People you may know will always be able to send you one message request. You can also choose to allow your Potential Connections and Others to send you a message request. If you choose to communicate with them, you will have to accept their message request first.","dm_permissionFAQ_q4_header":"I am 18 years old or older, what is changing for me?","dm_permissionFAQ_q5_body":"These updates will be happening within the next few weeks. To help ease the change, your new settings will be updated based on your current selection . For example, this means that if you currently have "no one" selected, when your new settings arrive, your updated settings will all be defaulted off.","dm_permissionFAQ_q6_header":"Why are my settings changing?","dm_permissionFAQ_q7_body":"We have strengthened our safety protections. When new settings have launched, users who are Potential Connections or Others can only send you one message request. You have the choice to accept their message or ignore it. If you are a teen, users who are 18 years of age or older who you do not follow will be blocked from sending you a message request even if you have the Potential Connections or Others setting set to "Requests". Visit our {CG_link} for more information.","pm_mt_ViolationReason_FakeEngagement_title":"Fake engagement","pm_mt_ViolationReason_FirearmsWeapons_desc":"TikTok can be a place that educates people on the responsible use and ownership of weapons, as well as the associated potential for serious harm. Firearms and explosive weapons can cause severe injury or death, especially when used in an unsafe manner. We do not allow the trade of firearms or explosive weapons, or content showing or promoting them if they are not used in a safe or appropriate setting. Visit our {CG_link} for more information.","pm_mt_ViolationReason_FirearmsWeapons_title":"Firearms and dangerous weapons","pm_mt_ViolationReason_FraudScam_desc":"We want people to be able to use our platform to learn about ways to be financially responsible and consider economic transactions or investment opportunities, without worrying about scams or financial exploitation. We do not allow attempts to defraud or scam members of our community. Visit our {CG_link} for more information.","pm_mt_ViolationReason_FraudScam_title":"Frauds and scams","pm_mt_ViolationReason_GraphicContent_desc":"Part of the joy of TikTok is coming across new and unexpected content. But the platform is not a place to intentionally shock, upset, or disgust others. We recognize this type of content may be triggering, cause psychological harm, or lead to extreme discomfort. We do not allow gory, gruesome, disturbing, or extremely violent content. Visit our {CG_link} for more information.","pm_mt_ViolationReason_GraphicContent_title":"Shocking and graphic content","pm_mt_ViolationReason_HarassBully_desc":"We welcome the respectful expression of different viewpoints but not toxicity or trolling. We do not allow language or behavior that harasses, humiliates, threatens, or doxxes anyone. This also includes responding to such acts with retaliatory harassment (but excludes non-harassing counter speech). Visit our {CG_link} for more information.","pm_mt_ViolationReason_HarassBully_title":"Harassment and bullying","pm_mt_ViolationReason_HateSpeech_desc":"TikTok is enriched by the various backgrounds of our community members. Our differences should be respected, rather than a cause for division. We do not allow any hateful behavior, hate speech, or promotion of hateful ideologies. This includes content that attacks a person or group because of protected attributes. Visit our {CG_link} for more information.","pm_mt_ViolationReason_HateSpeech_title":"Hate speech and hateful behaviors","pm_mt_ViolationReason_HumanExploi_desc":"We are committed to upholding individual human dignity and ensuring our platform is not used to take advantage of vulnerable people. We do not allow human exploitation, including trafficking and smuggling. We provide a space for survivors of human exploitation to share their stories, and for migrants and refugees to be able to document their journeys. Visit our {CG_link} for more information.","pm_mt_ViolationReason_HumanExploi_title":"Human exploitation","pm_mt_ViolationReason_LiveMinimumAge_desc":"You must be {age} years and older to have a TikTok account, and be 18 years and older to go LIVE. We are deeply committed to ensuring that TikTok is a safe and positive experience for people under the age of 18. If we learn someone is below the minimum age on TikTok, we will ban that account. If we learn someone is below the minimum age to go LIVE, we will ban their LIVE Access. Visit our {CG_link} for more information.","pm_mt_ViolationReason_LiveMinimumAge_title":"Go LIVE minimum age requirement","pm_mt_ViolationReason_Misinfo_desc":"In a global community, it is natural for people to have different opinions, but we seek to operate on a shared set of facts and reality. We do not allow inaccurate, misleading, or false content that may cause significant harm to individuals or society, regardless of intent. Significant harm includes physical, psychological, or societal harm and property damage. Visit our {CG_link} for more information.","pm_mt_ViolationReason_Misinfo_title":"Misinformation","pm_mt_ViolationReason_NudityExposure_desc":"We celebrate all shapes and sizes and want people to feel comfortable in how they present themselves and their bodies. We do not allow nudity, including uncovered genitals and buttocks, as well as nipples and areolas of women and girls. Sheer and partially see-through clothing is not considered covered. Visit our {CG_link} for more information.","pm_mt_ViolationReason_NudityExposure_title":"Nudity and body exposure","pm_mt_ViolationReason_PersonInfo_desc":"We are committed to making sure that any personal information shared intentionally or accidentally on TikTok does not lead to harm. We do not allow content that includes personal information that may create a risk of stalking, violence, phishing, fraud, identity theft, or financial exploitation, including content that someone has posted themselves or that they consented to being shared by others. Visit our {CG_link} for more information.","pm_mt_ViolationReason_PersonInfo_title":"Personal information","pm_mt_ViolationReason_RegulatedGoods_desc":"Regulated goods and services often play an important and essential role in people’s lives. However, these items are regulated for a reason. TikTok is not a place for illegal traffic or trade, or an unofficial market. We do not allow facilitating the trade of regulated, prohibited, or high-risk goods and services, such as alcohol, tobacco products, regulated substances, firearms and other dangerous weapons, sexual services, animals, or counterfeit goods. Visit our {CG_link} for more information.","pm_mt_ViolationReason_RegulatedGoods_title":"Trade of regulated goods and services","pm_mt_ViolationReason_SexualActivity_desc":"TikTok is a place where people can come to discuss or learn about sexuality, sex, or reproductive health. We are mindful that certain content involving sexuality, sex, or reproductive health may not be appropriate for young people, be considered offensive by some, or create the potential for exploitation. We do not allow sexual activity or services, including sex, sexual arousal, fetish and kink behavior, and seeking or offering sexual services. Visit our {CG_link} for more information.","pm_mt_ViolationReason_SexualActivity_title":"Sexual activity and services","pm_mt_ViolationReason_SexualExploi_desc":"We are committed to providing a space that embraces gender equity, supports healthy relationships, and respects intimate privacy. We do not allow sexual exploitation or gender-based violence, including non-consensual sexual acts, image-based sexual abuse, sextortion, physical abuse, and sexual harassment. Visit our {CG_link} for more information.","pm_mt_ViolationReason_SexualExploi_title":"Sexual exploitation and gender-based violence","pm_mt_ViolationReason_ShockingContentAnimal_title":"shocking and graphic content involving animals","pm_mt_ViolationReason_ShockingContentHuman_title":"shocking and graphic content involving humans","pm_mt_ViolationReason_SuggestiveContent_desc":"We welcome performances and dances where people can creatively express themselves, celebrate their culture, or seek to entertain. We are mindful that certain behaviors related to sexual arousal or suggestiveness may be offensive to some people and may put young people at risk of exploitation. We do not allow seductive performances or allusions to sexual activity by young people, or the use of sexually explicit narratives by anyone. Visit our {CG_link} for more information.","pm_mt_ViolationReason_SuggestiveContent_title":"Sexually suggestive content","pm_mt_ViolationReason_SuicideSelfHarm_desc":"We want TikTok to be a place where people can discuss emotionally complex topics in a supportive way without increasing the risk of harm. We do not allow showing, promoting, or sharing plans for suicide or self-harm. If you or someone you know has had thoughts of suicide or self-harm, support is available. Visit our {CG_link} for more information.","pm_mt_ViolationReason_SuicideSelfHarm_title":"Suicide and self-Harm","pm_mt_ViolationReason_UnoriginalContent_desc":"The creativity on TikTok is what makes it great, so you should only post your own work. We do not allow content that infringes someone else’s intellectual property rights. Visit our {CG_link} for more information.","pm_mt_ViolationReason_UnoriginalContent_title":"Unoriginal content and QR codes","pm_mt_ViolationReason_ViolentBehavior_desc":"We recognize that online content related to violence can cause real-world harm. We do not allow any violent threats, incitement to violence, or promotion of criminal activities that may harm people, animals, or property. If there is a specific, credible, and imminent threat to human life or serious physical injury, we report it to relevant law enforcement authorities. Visit our {CG_link} for more information.","pm_mt_ViolationReason_ViolentBehavior_title":"Violent behaviors and criminal activities","pm_mt_ViolationReason_ViolentOrgsIndi_desc":"There is no place on our platform for beliefs or propaganda that encourage violence or hate. We do not allow the presence of violent and hateful organizations or individuals on our platform. Often the ideas of these actors are amplified by others. We do not allow anyone to promote or materially support violent or hateful actors. Visit our {CG_link} for more information.","pm_mt_ViolationReason_ViolentOrgsIndi_title":"Violent and hateful organizations and individuals","pm_mt_ViolationReason_YouthAbuse_desc":"Allowing young people to explore and learn safely during their unique phase of development is our priority. We do not allow youth exploitation and abuse, including child sexual abuse material (CSAM), nudity, grooming, sextortion, solicitation, pedophilia, and physical or psychological abuse of young people. This includes content that is real, fictional, digitally created, and shown in fine art or objects. Visit our {CG_link} for more information.","pm_mt_ViolationReason_YouthAbuse_title":"Youth exploitation and abuse","pm_mt_ViolationReason_gamble_desc":"Many people around the world find entertainment through games of chance. While TikTok is an entertainment platform, we recognize that risking money in a game or a bet may lead to potential harm for some people, including serious financial loss or addiction. We do not allow the promotion of gambling services. Visit our {CG_link} for more information.","pm_mt_ViolationReason_gamble_title":"Gambling","pm_mt_abm_desc":"Introduce yourself and your perks to attract more subscribers.","pm_mt_abm_title":"About me","pm_mt_abm_viewers_tag":"Community","pm_mt_abm_viewerside_title":"About the host","pm_mt_analytics_diamonds":"Diamonds","pm_mt_apply_apply":"Apply","pm_mt_apply_message1":"{num, plural, one {You’ve applied for LIVE access and can go LIVE for the next 7 days. What is LIVE match?","pm_mt_matchNewFaq_topic1_1_1":"LIVE match is a feature that enables LIVE creators to engage in friendly competitions with one another during a LIVE.","pm_mt_matchNewFaq_topic1_1_2":"Viewers can support their favorite creator by sending Gifts or by liking the LIVE. Each viewer can send multiple Gifts and 1 like per match. LIVE creators will collect match points based the Gifts and likes the LIVE receives. 1 Coin represents 1 match point, and 1 like represents 3 match points.","pm_mt_matchNewFaq_topic1_1_3":"The winner of a LIVE match is the LIVE creator or team who collects the highest number of match points during the LIVE match.","pm_mt_matchNewFaq_topic1_1_3New":"During solo matches, the LIVE creator who collects the highest number of match points will be the winner. During a team match, the team that collects the highest number of match points will be the winner.","pm_mt_matchNewFaq_topic1_2":"2. What is a specific-gift match and how does it work?","pm_mt_matchNewFaq_topic1_2_1":"A LIVE creator can start a specific-gift match by choosing a specific Gift before sending a match invitation to another LIVE creator.","pm_mt_matchNewFaq_topic1_2_2":"In a specific-gift match, the winner is determined based on the number of specific Gifts that viewers send. Viewers can send other Gifts or like the LIVE to show support but, only the selected Gift will be counted.","pm_mt_matchNewFaq_topic1_2_3":"Specific Gifts are counted no matter whether they are in Gift Boxes or sent independently.","pm_mt_matchNewFaq_topic2_1":"1. Who are the LIVE match contributors?","pm_mt_matchNewFaq_topic2_1_1":"During all-gift matches, the match contributors are viewers who have either liked the LIVE or sent Gifts to show appreciation for content during a LIVE match.","pm_mt_matchNewFaq_topic2_1_2":"During specific-gift matches, the match contributors are viewers who have sent the specific Gift selected by the LIVE creator to show appreciation for content during a LIVE match.","pm_mt_matchNewFaq_topic2_2":"2. Who are the top contributors?","pm_mt_matchNewFaq_topic2_2_1":"The top 3 viewers who have contributed the most match points for both LIVE creators or teams during a LIVE match will be identified during the victory lap. Approximately 30% of the earnings will be deducted as a platform tax by third-party app store.","seriesWeb_landingPage_section6_answer4":"Series content is hidden behind a paywall, so users will need to pay for this content. This will not show up in a user's FYF. For this reason, we recommend creating exclusive content that builds upon content that is currently available to your audience for free. When considering what type of content to create, consider the content you are already creating for free, and take into consideration requests and questions you receive from your audience. Ultimately, you will be creating curated content that is specific to your fan base and specific to your niche. Series content will need to adhere to the same community guidelines that apply to all TikTok video creation. Each Series will undergo a moderation review process, which will take up to 48 hours.","seriesWeb_landingPage_section6_answer5":"There are several ways you can promote your Series content. You can anchor link your Series to this video and similarly, share with your users about your new Series content and how users can purchase. LIVE - you can go LIVE on TikTok and link your Series to your LIVE. During your LIVE, you can share information on your new Series content and how users can purchase. Vouchers - you can provide your users with a voucher, which is essentially a promo code, for a discount to purchase your Series. With the discounted price, this will also encourage more purchases.","seriesWeb_landingPage_section6_answer6":"Yes. The guidelines include rules and standards for using TikTok that apply to everyone and everything on our platform.","series_delistNotifications_reason_ED_body":"Violation reason: Disordered Eating and Body Image. We want TikTok to be a place that encourages self-esteem, and does not promote negative social comparisons. We do not allow showing or promoting disordered eating or any dangerous weight loss behaviors. If you or someone you know is experiencing concerns about body image, food, or exercise, support is available. Tap on “Get info” to view resources.","series_delistNotifications_reason_GBV_body":"Violation reason: Sexual Exploitation and Gender-Based Violence. We are committed to providing a space that embraces gender equity, supports healthy relationships, and respects intimate privacy. We do not allow sexual exploitation or gender-based violence, including non-consensual sexual acts, image-based sexual abuse, sextortion, physical abuse, and sexual harassment.","series_delistNotifications_reason_age_body":"Violation reason: Minimum Age Requirement. Users must be 13 years and older to have a TikTok account. We are deeply committed to ensuring that TikTok is a safe and positive experience for people under the age of 18. This starts by being old enough to use TikTok. If we learn someone is below the minimum age on TikTok, we will ban that account. Content created by anyone under 16 is ineligible for the For You feed and harder to find in search.","series_delistNotifications_reason_animalabuse_body":"Violation reason: Animal Abuse. We want our platform to be a place that respects animals and celebrates the ways that they enrich our lives across different cultures and regions. We do not allow animal abuse, cruelty, neglect, trade, or other forms of animal exploitation.","series_delistNotifications_reason_bullying_body":"Violation reason: Harrassment and Bullying. We welcome the respectful expression of different viewpoints but not toxicity or trolling. We do not allow language or behavior that harasses, humiliates, threatens, or doxxes anyone. This also includes responding to such acts with retaliatory harassment (but excludes non-harassing counter speech).","series_delistNotifications_reason_crime_body":"Violation reason: Violent Behaviors and Criminal Activities. We recognize that online content related to violence can cause real-world harm. We do not allow any violent threats, incitement to violence, or promotion of criminal activities that may harm people, animals, or property. If there is a specific, credible, and imminent threat to human life or serious physical injury, we report it to relevant law enforcement authorities.","series_delistNotifications_reason_dangerous_body":"Violation reason: Dangerous Activities and Challenges. Most activities or challenges are appropriate for everyone, but some carry a risk of significant injury. We do not allow showing or promoting dangerous activities and challenges. This includes dares, games, tricks, inappropriate use of dangerous tools, eating substances that are harmful to one’s health, or similar activities that may lead to significant physical harm.","series_delistNotifications_reason_drugs_body":"Violation reason: Alcohol, Tobacco, and Drugs. While adults make personal choices about how they engage with alcohol, drugs, and tobacco, we recognize that there are risks connected to trading and using these substances. We do not allow showing or promoting recreational drug use, or the trade of alcohol, tobacco products, and drugs.","series_delistNotifications_reason_elections_body":"Violation reason: Civic and Election Integrity. Elections are important moments of community conversation and promote the values of an open society. We do not allow misinformation about civic and electoral processes, regardless of intent. This includes misinformation about how to vote, registering to vote, eligibility requirements of candidates, the processes to count ballots and certify elections, and the final outcome of an election.","series_delistNotifications_reason_exploitation_body":"Violation reason: Human Exploitation. We are committed to upholding individual human dignity and ensuring our platform is not used to take advantage of vulnerable people. We do not allow human exploitation, including trafficking and smuggling. We provide a space for survivors of human exploitation to share their stories, and for migrants and refugees to be able to document their journeys.","series_delistNotifications_reason_fakeengagement_body":"Violation reason: Fake Engagement. Authentic engagement is central to the integrity of our platform and informs how we recommend content that others may find interesting. We do not allow the trade of services that attempt to artificially increase engagement or deceive TikTok’s recommendation system.","series_delistNotifications_reason_gambling_body":"Violation reason: Gambling. Many people around the world find entertainment through games of chance. While TikTok is an entertainment platform, we recognize that risking money in a game or a bet may lead to potential harm for some people, including serious financial loss or addiction. We do not allow the promotion of gambling services.","series_delistNotifications_reason_graphiccontent_body":"Violation reason: Shocking and Graphic Content. Part of the joy of TikTok is coming across new and unexpected content. But the platform is not a place to intentionally shock, upset, or disgust others. We recognize this type of content may be triggering, cause psychological harm, or lead to extreme discomfort. We do not allow gory, gruesome, disturbing, or extremely violent content.","series_delistNotifications_reason_hateorgs_body":"Violation reason: Violent and Hateful Organizations and Individuals. There is no place on our platform for beliefs or propaganda that encourage violence or hate. We do not allow the presence of violent and hateful organizations or individuals on our platform. Often the ideas of these actors are amplified by others. We do not allow anyone to promote or materially support violent or hateful actors.","series_delistNotifications_reason_hatespeech_body":"Violation reason: Hate Speech and Hateful Behaviors. TikTok is enriched by the various backgrounds of our community members. Our differences should be respected, rather than a cause for division. We do not allow any hateful behavior, hate speech, or promotion of hateful ideologies. This includes content that attacks a person or group because of protected attributes.","series_delistNotifications_reason_misinformation_body":"Violation reason: Misinformation. In a global community, it is natural for people to have different opinions, but we seek to operate on a shared set of facts and reality. We do not allow inaccurate, misleading, or false content that may cause significant harm to individuals or society, regardless of intent. Significant harm includes physical, psychological, or societal harm, and property damage.","series_delistNotifications_reason_nudity_body":"Violation reason: Nudity & Body Exposure. We celebrate all shapes and sizes and want people to feel comfortable in how they present themselves and their bodies. We do not allow nudity, including uncovered genitals and buttocks, as well as nipples and areolas of women and girls. Sheer and partially see-through clothing is not considered covered.","series_delistNotifications_reason_personalinfo_body":"Violation reason: Personal Information. We are committed to making sure that any personal information shared intentionally or accidentally on TikTok does not lead to harm. We do not allow content that includes personal information that may create a risk of stalking, violence, phishing, fraud, identity theft, or financial exploitation, including content that someone has posted themselves or that they consented to being shared by others.","series_delistNotifications_reason_regulatedgoods_body":"Violation reason: Trade of Regulated Goods and Services. Regulated goods and services often play an important and essential role in people’s lives. However, these items are regulated for a reason. TikTok is not a place for illegal traffic or trade, or an unofficial market. We do not allow facilitating the trade of regulated, prohibited, or high-risk goods and services, such as alcohol, tobacco products, regulated substances, firearms and other dangerous weapons, sexual services, animals, or counterfeit goods.","series_delistNotifications_reason_scams_body":"Violation reason: Frauds and Scams. We want people to be able to use our platform to learn about ways to be financially responsible and consider economic transactions or investment opportunities, without worrying about scams or financial exploitation. We do not allow attempts to defraud or scam members of our community.","series_delistNotifications_reason_selfharm_body":"Violation reason: Suicide and Self-Harm. We want TikTok to be a place where people can discuss emotionally complex topics in a supportive way without increasing the risk of harm. We do not allow showing, promoting, or sharing plans for suicide or self-harm. If you or someone you know has had thoughts of suicide or self-harm, support is available. Tap on “Get info” to view resources.","series_delistNotifications_reason_sexualactivity_body":"Violation reason: Sexual Activity and Services. TikTok is a place where people can come to discuss or learn about sexuality, sex or reproductive health. We are mindful that certain content involving sexuality, sex or reproductive health may not be appropriate for young people, be considered offensive by some, or create the potential for exploitation. We do not allow sexual activity or services, including sex, sexual arousal, fetish and kink behavior, and seeking or offering sexual services.","series_delistNotifications_reason_suggestivecontent_body":"Violation reason: Sexually Suggestive Content. We welcome performances and dances where people can creatively express themselves, celebrate their culture, or seek to entertain. We are mindful that certain behaviors related to sexual arousal or suggestiveness may be offensive to some people and may put young people at risk of exploitation. We do not allow seductive performances or allusions to sexual activity by young people, or the use of sexually explicit narratives by anyone.","series_delistNotifications_reason_synthmedia_body":"Violation reason: Synthetic and Manipulated Media. We welcome the creativity that new artificial intelligence (AI) and other digital technologies may unlock. However, AI can make it more difficult to distinguish between fact and fiction. Synthetic or manipulated media that shows realistic scenes must be clearly disclosed. We do not allow synthetic media that contains the likeness of any real private figure, in addition to synthetic media of public figures if the content is used for endorsements or violates any other policy.","series_delistNotifications_reason_unoriginal_body":"Violation reason: Unoriginal Content and QR Codes. The creativity on TikTok is what makes it great, so you should only post your own work. Content is ineligible for the For You feed and harder to find in search if it involves unoriginal or reproduced content that does not have any new or creative changes, or contains Quick Response (QR) codes.","series_delistNotifications_reason_weapons_body":"Violation reason: Firearms and Dangerous Weapons. TikTok can be a place that educates people on the responsible use and ownership of weapons, as well as the associated potential for serious harm. Firearms and explosive weapons can cause severe injury or death, especially when used in an unsafe manner. We do not allow the trade of firearms or explosive weapons, or content showing or promoting them if they are not used in a safe or appropriate setting.","series_delistNotifications_reason_youthabuse_body":"Violation reason: Youth Exploitation and Abuse. Allowing young people to explore and learn safely during their unique phase of development is our priority. We do not allow youth exploitation and abuse, including child sexual abuse material (CSAM), nudity, grooming, sextortion, solicitation, pedophilia, and physical or psychological abuse of young people. This includes content that is real, fictional, digitally created, and shown in fine art or objects.","series_delistNotifications_tooltip_header":"Series delisted for violating Community Guidelines","series_detailsForm_coverDesc_body":"A cover photo is the first thing people will see when they come to your Series page and can help them understand what your Series is about. you have a friend struggling with these concerns, encourage them to contact a local eating disorder support group. When you talk to your friend, focus on the daily, non-eating disorder parts of their life, and avoid focusing on their eating disorder. Ask your friend open-ended questions, such as “how are you feeling today?”, and listen to their answer without judging or interrupting, even if you don’t agree with some of what they say. Be encouraging when your friend seems tired of the struggle to recover. Remind them of all the positive things about recovery, such as things that they used to like to do and will be able to do again once they are well. Discourage toxic and unhelpful talk by switching to more positive topics and remind them of their progress and wins, no matter how small.","support_resource":"At TikTok, we work to support everyone in our community make positive decisions about how they interact with online challenges. yourself","take_a_break_ed":"Take a break when you need it","take_a_break_ed_1":"We live so much of our lives online and sometimes we may find ourselves drawing comparisons to others online. It’s important to recognize these feelings and give yourself a break when things become overwhelming. Log off for awhile. Try doing something positive that makes you feel better and relieves stress, such as getting out into nature, listening to music, dancing, or practicing meditation.","take_a_break_to_relax":"Take time out","take_a_break_to_relax_1":"Taking slow, deep breaths can help you feel less tension in your mind and body. Try slowly counting to 4 while you breathe in through your nose, hold that breath and count to 7, and then count to 8 as you breathe out through your mouth.","take_a_break_to_relax_2":"Focus on the here and now. An easy way to do this is name 5 things you can see, 4 things you can touch, 3 things you can hear, 2 things you can smell and 1 thing you can taste.","take_a_break_to_relax_3":"Try splashing some ice water on your face, or opening your windows to breathe in some cool fresh air. This could help calm your nervous system.","take_a_break_to_relax_4":"Journal your thoughts. If you don’t know where to start, try writing it as if you’re telling someone that you trust.","take_a_moment":"Take a moment","talk_to_a_professional":"Talk to a professional","talk_to_a_professional_body":"If you or someone you know is going through a difficult time, here are some resources that may help.","talk_to_a_professional_contact":"Contact","talk_to_a_professional_ed":"If you are struggling with an eating disorder, considering harming yourself, or if you are concerned about the well-being of a friend or family member, we strongly suggest that you seek help from a health professional or your local helpline. If the situation is an emergency, you should contact your local emergency services.","talk_to_someone_u_trust_ed_1":"If you begin to notice that you are experiencing body image or eating concerns, reach out to a family member, friend, teacher, school counselor, or someone you trust to let them know you are going through a difficult time and would like to talk about it. Remember, you don’t have to be in immediate trouble to seek support. You could share some resources about eating disorders with them ahead of time so they are prepared.","talk_to_someone_you_trust":"Talk to someone you trust","talk_to_someone_you_trust_1":"We understand that asking for help or opening up about how you are feeling can be really difficult. This includes content that depicts implied nudity, sexualizes body parts, or is blatantly erotic or sensual (i.e. strip teases).","vid_mod_analytics_penalty_reason_sexual_title":"Overtly sexualized content","vid_mod_analytics_penalty_reason_spam_desc":"Content that tries to trick or manipulate users to get more followers, likes, views or other engagement metrics on the platform is not eligible for the For You feed. This includes content that encourages users to follow or like each other, or content that tricks users into clicking like or share buttons. Additionally, content that promotes conspiracy theories and spreads false or harmful information about current events and events where details are still developing are also ineligible for the For You feed.","vid_mod_analytics_penalty_reason_spam_title":"Spam, inauthentic, or misleading content","vid_mod_analytics_penalty_reason_stunts_desc":"When replicated without safety precautions, certain activities can be risky or dangerous, which could lead to physical harm. We can tell if a video is unoriginal if it has a watermark or a superimposed logo on it. Low quality content includes very short videos, static images, and videos made only of GIFs.
